name: Rhideon Gray
ai_summary: Rhideon Gray has 1 year of Beatty experience plus volunteer work with children aged 5-11 in Davis County and is passionate about teaching as a life calling. He demonstrates strong conflict resolution skills with an accountability-focused approach and is available part-time after school hours.

transcripts.q3:
Hi, my name is rhydian. I have one year of our Beatty experience and prior to that, I've done plenty of volunteer work with children in art and stem through the elementary school system. In Davis County, I have worked with children anywhere, between 5 and 11. And the reason that I love working with children is just because I feel like it is a call on my life and
 It is the most rewarding work that we can do.
transcripts.q4:
I am located in North Ogden and
 I am willing to work about 30 miles from that location.
transcripts.q5: I am actively looking for a part-time work. I am currently in school, so I am going to be available from 3:00 p.m. to midnight Monday through Friday and weekends as needed.
transcripts.q6:
When conflict arises between two children, it is important to separate the two. But then also teach accountability and guide them through having conversations that are age-appropriate about the kinds of impacts that those behaviors might have. So if there are two children that are in that are fighting and one hits the other, then, of course, we do, want to teach them to apologize and explain to them the reasons for keeping
 being our hands to ourselves.
transcripts.q7: I would be a great up kid teacher, because I know how to make a classroom fun and engaging, but I am also dedicated to the growth and learning of my students.
